turn_center_hex_with_box_wrench.query: a worker steadies a circular metal fixture on the lathe spindle with the left hand and repeatedly turns its center hex using a silver box-end wrench in the right hand
turn_center_hex_with_box_wrench.prompt:
Event: a worker steadies a circular metal fixture on the lathe spindle with the left hand and repeatedly turns its center hex using a silver box-end wrench in the right hand
Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.

place_box_wrench_on_carriage.query: a worker removes a silver box-end wrench from the center hex on the lathe spindle and places the wrench on the carriage to the right
place_box_wrench_on_carriage.prompt:
Event: a worker removes a silver box-end wrench from the center hex on the lathe spindle and places the wrench on the carriage to the right
Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.

press_left_lathe_control.query: a worker presses the red-and-white square control below the lathe spindle with the left hand
press_left_lathe_control.prompt:
Event: a worker presses the red-and-white square control below the lathe spindle with the left hand
Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.

operate_front_carriage_handle.query: a worker grips and operates the large black handwheel on the front side of the lathe carriage with the left hand
operate_front_carriage_handle.prompt:
Event: a worker grips and operates the large black handwheel on the front side of the lathe carriage with the left hand
Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.
